title: Smelt your first metal
description: Queue a Metal Smelting job and produce your first 4 units of metal.

title: Scale up metal production
description: Keep smelting and advancing time until you have produced 16 units of metal in total.

title: Earn 2,000 cr from sales
description: Sell metal on a regional market to earn 2,000 credits in proceeds.

title: Run your first convoy
description: Use logistics to deliver cargo between two different star systems.

title: Expand to two ships
description: Reinvest your profits and grow your fleet to at least two ships.

title: Reach 130,000 net worth
description: Grow your corporation to 130,000 credits in estimated net worth.

title: Complete a faction contract
description: Accept a contract from the board and fulfil it for a reputation and credit reward.
